generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted directly on the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder located after the gear transmission to measure gearbox output angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring motor input current I_M"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance AxisAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring the output angle of the robot axis (r_out)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AxisAngleDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical‑to‑virtual interaction (DataTransmitted)
instance MotorEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance AxisAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AxisAngleSensor
]

// C10: Data
instance MeasuredMotorAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw motor shaft angle trace (r_M) delivered by MotorEncoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MeasuredGearboxAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Gearbox output shaft angle trace (r_G) delivered by GearboxEncoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MeasuredAxisAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Axis output angle trace (r_out) delivered by AxisAngleSensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AxisAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MeasuredCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor input current trace I_M delivered by MotorCurrentSensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DerivedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque calculated from measured current and motor parameters"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DerivedAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity derived from angle traces"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AxisAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DerivedAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular acceleration derived from angular velocity"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AxisAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MqttEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker enabling live streaming of sensor data to the digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService,
                     DataComparisonService,
                     ControlAccuracyImprovementService,
                     DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink execution environment processing measurement data and running friction models"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService,
                     DataComparisonService,
                     ControlAccuracyImprovementService
]

instance DashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Web‑based dashboard for interactive visualization of data and model results"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tooling providing structural and behavioral asset models"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

// C6: Services
instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of static, kinetic and viscous friction parameters for the gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterInsight
]

instance DataComparisonService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time comparison of simulated model outputs with measured data"
    DTDFVocab:provides DivergenceAlertInsight
]

instance ControlAccuracyImprovementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model‑based adjustment of control parameters to improve motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelUpdateInsight,
                     UpdateFrictionModelAction
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization of sensor data, simulation results and identified parameters in a unified dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

// C17: Insights / Actions
instance FrictionParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Derived friction parameters (static, kinetic, viscous) for the gearbox"
]

instance DivergenceAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alert generated when simulated and measured data diverge beyond a predefined threshold"
]

instance ModelUpdateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommendation to update friction model parameters in the robot controller for improved accuracy"
]

instance UpdateFrictionModelAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatically update friction model parameters in the SINUMERIK 840D controller"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of data traces, model simulations and identified friction parameters on the dashboard"
]

// C10: Models / Data
instance AxisSysMLBlockDefinitionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram describing the axis structure, ports and connections"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance AxisSysMLInternalBlockDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram showing internal flow of signals between motor, gearwheel and gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance MotorSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink model of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance GearwheelSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of the gearwheel dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance GearboxSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of the cycloidal gearbox including friction models"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Friction model combining Coulomb (static/kinetic) and viscous components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model for the gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model representing pre‑sliding displacement"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model capturing dynamic friction behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "None – the digital shadow follows the one‑way data‑flow definition of a digital shadow and does not send control commands back to the robot."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real‑time (continuous) operation‑time scale: data are acquired and processed continuously during robot operation to enable online friction model updates."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A digital shadow consisting of DataTraces and DataPoints linked to Sources (sensors or derived data), a Processing component that consumes input traces and runs simulation models, and an Asset representation (MABI robot first axis). The components are orchestrated via MQTT and presented in a dashboard."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin (shadow) integrates engineering models (design stage) and runtime data (operational stage) to support continuous model refinement during operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Traceability of each DataPoint to its originating sensor and processing model, continuous re‑identification of white‑box and black‑box friction parameters to maintain model fidelity, and validation by comparing simulated frictionless behavior with measured data to detect deviations."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Live data are transmitted from the robot to the digital shadow using the MQTT protocol over an IoT network. The MQTT topics carry current, angle, and derived quantities."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Use of the Asset Administration Shell (AAS), a recognized Industry 4.0 standard for asset description and integration, and adherence to MBSE guidelines (SysML, RFLP, etc.)."
]
